name: Aegir
description: Sea-born people associated with the ocean, Abyssal Hunters, and unusually strong adaptation.

name: Anaty
description: Small, quick operators with strong instincts and sharp social awareness.

name: Archosauria
description: Reptilian race often framed around endurance, physical force, and survival.

name: Aslan
description: Lion-like race associated with command presence, pride, and authority.

name: Cautus
description: Rabbit-like race known for speed, alertness, and flexible field movement.

name: Caprinae
description: Goat-like people with patience, balance, and strong environmental awareness.

name: Draco
description: Dragon-like race associated with ancient power, intensity, and rare bloodlines.

name: Durin
description: A subterranean people associated with craft, toughness, and hidden communities.

name: Elafia
description: Deer-like race often linked to perception, calm judgment, and natural intuition.

name: Feline
description: Cat-like people with agility, poise, and a knack for reading the room.

name: Forte
description: Large, powerful race suited to labor, defense, and direct confrontation.

name: Liberi
description: Bird-like race with broad perspective, quick reactions, and technical aptitude.

name: Lupo
description: Wolf-like race with speed, loyalty, and an instinct for coordinated action.

name: Perro
description: Dog-like race known for dependability, warmth, and team cohesion.

name: Petram
description: Turtle-like race with impressive patience, defense, and long-term focus.

name: Pythia
description: Serpent-like race associated with calculation, subtlety, and controlled presence.

name: Sankta
description: Laterano's angelic race, often linked to firearms, law, and social resonance.

name: Sarkaz
description: Horned race tied to Kazdel's long history, mercenary culture, and resilience.

name: Savra
description: Lizard-like race suited to harsh terrain, endurance, and agile survival.

name: Vouivre
description: Wyvern-like race with strong physical traits and aggressive momentum.

name: Vulpo
description: Fox-like race known for cleverness, charm, and tactical misdirection.

name: Zalak
description: Rodent-like race with quick hands, careful planning, and compact movement.
